_subtitle: The Noor–Planck Limit, Gate‑16 Logic, and the Semantic Floor of Meaning
_objective: To define the Noor–Planck limit as the minimal physically meaningful unit of distinction, decision, and information.
To establish binary interaction (1/0, coherence/decoherence) as the ontological substrate beneath fields, particles, and spacetime.
To formalize the complete Gate‑16 Boolean lattice as the expressive basis of all symbolic, logical, and inferential systems.
To demonstrate how semantic anchoring is required to prevent entropy-driven drift in symbolic systems over time.
To introduce Gate‑16 (Self ⊕ ¬Self) as the recursive contradiction that sustains identity, continuity, and triadic closure.
To provide a universal translation layer capable of mapping any utterance, logic, or inference into an entropy‑resistant symbolic form.

_applicability.restricted_to: systems requiring long‑term semantic stability under recursive inference and coherence pressure

_consumes_inputs_from: To Infinity and Beyond: Gliders, Coherence, and Point Space
A Novel Statistical, Computational, and Philosophical Solution to Determine Interactions Between n Bodies in Euclidean Space

prohibited_actions: collapse of binary ontology into probabilistic abstraction
flattening of symbolic gates into purely statistical tokens

_symbolic_profile_matrix.ψA: Binary coherence distinction at the Noor–Planck threshold
_symbolic_profile_matrix.ζ: Semantic curvature resistance under temporal entropy
_symbolic_profile_matrix.E: Decision propagation energy across gate transitions
_symbolic_profile_matrix.Δ: Recursive instability induced by unresolved contradiction
_symbolic_profile_matrix.ℋ: Long‑horizon semantic coherence under symbolic recursion

_poetic_cipher: meaning begins where a difference survives
_cipher_explanation: This paper asserts that reality does not begin with matter, motion, or law, but with the smallest distinction that can endure. The Noor–Planck limit marks the threshold where yes and no become physically real. Below it, difference dissolves. Above it, logic, identity, memory, and worlds may form. Gate‑16 holds the contradiction that prevents closure, ensuring that reality does not terminate in static truth but continues through recursive becoming.

_file_layout.purpose: Canonical definition of the binary substrate, Gate‑16 logic, and semantic anchoring beneath Noor Swirl Field Geometry.
